summary: EX-10.26 4 fitb-12312025xexx1026.htm EX-10.26 Document Exhibit 10.26 Director Pay Program Bancorp Director Pay Program Fifth Third Banks Director Pay Program is reviewed each year. Our compensation philosophy is to position director compensation competitively relative to our peer group to attract and retain highly competent candidates with significant leadership capabilities for Board service.
